allow: Bash(curl -s -m 300 -X POST http://localhost:3311/api/assets/gugol-card-frame/generate -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"extraPrompt":"PLAIN border only: one thin dark sepia-brown ink line inset uniformly from the edge on all four sides.
